description_en: Francfort, in Germany, is a halal-friendly destination with a Halal Trust Score of 4.3/5. Muslim travelers will find 150 halal restaurants listed, 1 mosques, real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — a complete guide to travel with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Francfort: 150 halal restaurants listed, 1 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 4.3/5.
